title: Immersive Geology
description: An add-on for Immersive Engineering that implements many new ores and multi-block machines, the core of this mod is to implement real world ore processing in a fun way.
body:
![Immersive Geology Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/370614/description_e70be430-efe7-462d-b0e0-d05bbbe7211a.png) --- ## Mod Description **Immersive Geology** is an add-on mod for **Immersive Engineering** that enhances the world with new minerals, and advanced engineering options. Designed to integrate with Immersive Engineering and other technology-focused mods, Immersive Geology introduces: - New mineral veins and ores to enrich exploration and mining - Additional multiblock structures for advanced resource processing - Detailed engineering tools and machinery to optimize production - Do note; This is a complete overhaul, as such some vanilla ores have been removed from generation. This mod is crafted for dedicated engineers, miners, and survival enthusiasts, aiming to provide a richer, more rewarding experience in resource gathering and industrialization. Through its features, I hope to share real-world insights into the processes and applications that shape the very materials we use to build our world. ~*Muddykat* Developer Tutorial on Aluminum Processing [https://youtu.be/ycxrnk6jeBY](https://youtu.be/ycxrnk6jeBY) --- ## Engineering Department Team | Profile | Name & Role | | --- | --- | | | **[Muddykats](https://github.com/muddykat-tech)**
Lead Developer | | | **[UnSchtalch](https://www.curseforge.com/members/unschtalch)**

Texture Artist | | | **Bilebirda**
Texture Artist | --- ## Engineering Department Discord Server [](https://discord.gg/team-immersive-geologys-eco-friendly-tm-server-610912351142674434) --- ## Compatibility - **Version 1.20.1** was developed using **Immersive Engineering 1.20.1-10.1.0-171** and **Forge 47.3.0**. - **Version 1.16.5** was developed using **Immersive Engineering 1.16.5-5.1.0-148** and **Forge 36.2.35**. --- ## Further Mod Information The Engineer's Manual contains direct mod information, and JEI provides recipe details. For a more in-depth guide, visit the mod's [Wikipedia page](https://github.com/Immersive-Geology-Team/Immersive-Geology/wiki).
